data.title: 国际服炸服11
data.summary: [2/16(Thu) Connection Error] We have identified an issue where it's impossible to connect to the gam
data.body:
[2/16(Thu) Connection Error]

We have identified an issue where it's impossible to connect to the game after the update on 2/16(Thu).
We are currently investigating and promise to update you through the official Forum notice if there are any changes.

[2/17 (Fri) Connection Error]

We have identified that there is an issue with the game connection. This also includes the game crash occurring in certain devices.
We are currently investigating and promise to update you through the official Forum notice if there are any changes.

[2/17 (Fri) Connection/Crash issue Announcement]

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the continuous connection/crash issues.
Please refer to the following announcement in our official Forum.

➡️Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/103429
